title: Automated Market Intelligence Pipeline
overview: End-to-end Python web scraper and NLP relevance pipeline extracting market intelligence and technical trends into structured datasets.
challenge: Manually monitoring industry hiring and technology trends required dozens of hours of repetitive web research.
solution: Built a multi-threaded Python scraper with NLP keyword scoring that extracts job specs and outputs structured Markdown reports.
archExplanation: Python Scrapy pipeline crawls web listings; NLP relevance scorer filters technologies; SQLite stores metrics powering BI feeds.
impact: Automated 100% of market trend data extraction
learnings: Rate limiting and proxy rotation prevent web crawler blocks
Structured Pydantic schemas prevent downstream parsing errors
